commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review plus normal mergeability and check gating.; Cleared: The diff only changes internal task attribution plumbing and tests; it does not touch secrets, dependencies, workflows, permissions, install scripts, package publishing, or package resolution. commands.review_summary:
The PR threads the resolved subagent target agent id through subagent task registration and makes task creation infer agent_id from childSessionKey before falling back to parent ownership.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +105. Total +111 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main builds cross-agent childSessionKey values from targetAgentId, but task creation resolves agentId from explicit agent id, ownerKey, or requesterSessionKey, so the source path reproduces the wrong parent attribution without running a write-producing repro.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review plus normal mergeability and check gating.
